headline: Traders Ready to Put War Behind Them Dial Up Risk
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Credit investors are loading up on riskier debt, betting that Iran and the US can extend their truce, and leaving behind havens they’ve favored since the war broke out in late February.Most Read from BloombergTrump Says Iran Will Suspend Nuclear Program as Hormuz OpensNvidia Makes Quantum Computing CEO a Billionaire in DaysIran Broadcasts Hormuz Strait Shut as Owners Report GunfireHow Anthropic Learned Mythos Was Too Dangerous for the WildHormuz Chaos, Lebanon Clashes Dent Trump P

headline: Nvidia Rival Cerebras Files For IPO After Scrapping Plans Last Year
summary: Cerebras Systems has revived its IPO plans with a new SEC filing, aiming to list on Nasdaq as demand grows for AI chip infrastructure and computing power.

raw.headline: Nvidia Rival Cerebras Files For IPO After Scrapping Plans Last Year
raw.summary: Cerebras Systems has revived its IPO plans with a new SEC filing, aiming to list on Nasdaq as demand grows for AI chip infrastructure and computing power.

headline: Conflict in the Middle East: Is another show of resilience likely?
summary: Investing.com -- Analysts at Citi believe the global economy is well-positioned to weather a severe disruption in the Middle East, suggesting that the "momentum" of households and firms may once again prevent a slide into a deep recession despite significant headwinds from energy costs.

raw.headline: Conflict in the Middle East: Is another show of resilience likely?

headline: How The Man Group (LSE:EMG) Story Is Shifting Around Tight £2.90 Valuation Targets
summary: Analysts updating their models for Man Group have shifted fair value assumptions from £2.75 to £2.98, placing much of the recent price target discussion in the tight £2.90 to £2.91 range. This cluster reflects a mix of raised and trimmed targets, as different analysts weigh execution risks against the case for the shares to move closer to that refreshed fair value band. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative might shape the way you track Man Group from here. Analyst Price...
